creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 165113
Window shot of a randomly-picked attachment detail displaying the problem

When I click on the "Details" link next to a patch attached to a ticket, I see a giant _empty_ rectangle dominating the page. Should not it contain the diff (perhaps, syntax-colored)?

I'm using firefox-42 here and the adblock is completely disabled for the entire freebsd.org domain.
